violations.text: Egg rolls, beef, and chicken was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Beef was observed thawing in stagnant water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
Knives and utensils were observed stored between the prep unit and prep table. Knives and utensils were re-located at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The refuse area was observed with an accumulation of debris and leaf clutter. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The door to the outside, located in the rear kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
Inspector observed food stored in dish pans and on a cardboard box. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
